title: betula alba var. laciniata
intro: Betula alba var. laciniata, also known as the cutleaf white birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Betulaceae family. The medicinal properties of Betula alba var. laciniata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat conditions such as eczema and acne. Betula alba var. laciniata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
